name: Live-API-Connectors-Smoke-Test
description: 16 Claims für die 8 Live-API-Connectors die seit 2026-05-04 deployed wurden: NIH MedlinePlus + CDC Newsroom + Snopes + Correctiv + Full Fact + Bellingcat + FactCheck.org + NIH ClinVar. Jeder Connector wird mit 2 Claims probiert. WICHTIG: RSS-Feeds verändern sich täglich — diese Tests prüfen primär Trigger-Reliabilität, nicht Verdict-Genauigkeit.
expected_summary: Smoke-Test-Format: 70-80 % Source-Match akzeptabel da RSS-Feeds volatile. Jeder Connector ist 'OK' wenn mindestens 1/2 Claims Hit hat.

claims.claim: Diabetes type 2 is reversible with strict diet alone.
High blood pressure is the silent killer.
Measles cases doubled in US 2024 due to vaccination decline.
Flu vaccination rates among children have dropped significantly.
Bill Gates puts microchips in COVID vaccines.
Pope Francis endorsed Donald Trump for president.
Bill Gates kauft systematisch deutsches Ackerland auf.
Migranten erhalten in Deutschland höhere Sozialleistungen als Einheimische.
NHS funding has been cut every year since 2010.
UK has the lowest unemployment rate in the G7.
MH17 flight was shot down by Russian-controlled BUK missile in 2014.
Wagner Group conducts operations in multiple African countries.
Joe Biden's economic policies caused inflation to spike to 9 percent.
Trump's tax cuts in 2017 paid for themselves through economic growth.
BRCA1 mutations significantly increase breast cancer risk.
Cystic fibrosis is caused by mutations in the CFTR gene.
